variant: give me a 3-day beginner gym split as a table with exercises, sets and reps

request.message: give me a 3-day beginner gym split as a table with exercises, sets and reps

response_body.response: here's a 3-day full body split for beginners. each day hits all major muscle groups with compound lifts first, then isolation work. keep rest periods 60–90 seconds between sets. work each set to 0–3 reps in reserve (RIR) — that last rep should feel hard but doable.  each muscle hits 9–12 hard sets per week spread across the three days, which is the sweet spot for growth. pick the same exercises for at least 6–8 weeks and add weight when you can hit the top of your rep range with clean form for two sessions in a row. log every session so you actually track progress.
